subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou art He Who hath brought forth all created things from the unseen realm of Thine eternity and raised them up [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی انت الذی اظهرت الممکنات من غیب ازلیتک و ابعثت
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @creation of the world, @consolation and comfort, @love of God
